storyHook: 忘记密码，验证身份，设置新密码

narrative.when: 周五早上，要登录系统交东西
narrative.who: 甲（账户主人）· 乙（客服，邮件/电话协助）
narrative.how: 尝试登录失败后联系客服
narrative.method: 发现无法登录、验证身份、设置新密码、记下密码
narrative.event: 甲忘了密码，今天必须登录系统交一份东西

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I put in my name and word, but it will not let me in.
turns.zh: 我输入了用户名和密码，但进不去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is the trouble? Is the word wrong?
turns.zh: 出什么问题了？密码不对吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it says the word is not right. I have to get in the system today.
turns.zh: 是的，它说密码不对。我今天必须登录系统。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see. Do you have your account name with you?
turns.zh: 明白了。你手边有账户名吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it is my work box.
turns.zh: 有，是我的工作信箱。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I will send a note to that box to let you put in a new word.
turns.zh: 好的。我会向那个邮箱发一封邮件，让你设置新密码。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Will that take long? I have a thing to send in before the end of the day.
turns.zh: 那要很久吗？我今天之前要交一份东西。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, it will be quick. Let me send it now.
turns.zh: 不会，很快的。我现在就发。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see it in my box. I will go to the net.
turns.zh: 我在收件箱里看到了。我去上网。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. Let me see if you have any trouble.
turns.zh: 慢慢来。让我看看你有没有问题。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I have the page open now.
turns.zh: 好的，我现在打开了那个页面。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Put in a new word that is not like the old one.
turns.zh: 好的。输入一个跟旧密码不同的新密码。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have put in a new one. It says it is done.
turns.zh: 我输入了新密码。它说已完成。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Now go back to the sign-in page and test it.
turns.zh: 很好。现在回到登录页面试试。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am in! Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 我登进去了！谢谢你的帮助。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Go back to the sign-in page and give it a go.
turns.zh: 好了。回到登录页，试试看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you for helping me.
turns.zh: 我进来了！谢谢你的帮忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Happy to help. Did you put the new word in a place?
turns.zh: 很高兴能帮忙。你把新词记在什么地方了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not now. I will put it in my book.
turns.zh: 还没。我这就记在本子上。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. That way you will not have this trouble again.
turns.zh: 好主意。这样你就不会再遇到这个麻烦了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I have it now. It is safe in my book.
turns.zh: 是的，现在记下了。在本子上很安全。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Is there anything more?
turns.zh: 太好了。还有别的吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that is all. You have been a great help.
turns.zh: 没有了，就这些。你帮了大忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My pleasure. Have a good day and do well with your work.
turns.zh: 不客气。祝你有美好的一天，工作顺利。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. You too. sure.
turns.zh: 谢谢。你也是。好的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, the new word is in your book now. That is good.
turns.zh: 好，新词现在记在本子上了。那很好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I will not make the same error again.
turns.zh: 是的，我不会再犯同样的错误了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us go through the steps again to be certain.
turns.zh: 我们再过一遍步骤，确保没问题。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No need. I have it all in my head and in my book.
turns.zh: 不用了。我都记在脑子里和本子上了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Then you are ready to get on with your work.
turns.zh: 那行。那你就可以继续工作了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I will do that now. Thank you for your time.
turns.zh: 是的，我这就去。谢谢你花时间帮我。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not at all. I am happy it all went well.
turns.zh: 别客气。很高兴一切顺利。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One last thing: if you have any trouble, do come back to us.
turns.zh: 最后一件事：如果还有问题，随时找我们。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will keep that in mind. Thanks again.
turns.zh: 我会记住的。再次感谢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are welcome. Have a good day now.
turns.zh: 不客气。祝您今天愉快。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Your new word is ready.
turns.zh: 好的，你的新密码已经准备好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have put it in my book.
turns.zh: 我已经把它记在本子上了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Do you have any other questions?
turns.zh: 很好。你还有其他问题吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, that is all. I am ready to go in.
turns.zh: 没有了，我准备进去了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Go on. Let me have word if you need more.
turns.zh: 请便。如果需要什么，随时告诉我。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I am in. The page is open.
turns.zh: 好了，我进来了。页面打开了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now you can put in your work.
turns.zh: 很好。现在你可以提交你的东西了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I see the button. Here goes.
turns.zh: 是的，我看到按钮了。开始吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time. No need to be quick.
turns.zh: 慢慢来，不用着急。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. It says 'sent' on the glass.
turns.zh: 完成了。玻璃上显示‘已发送’。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is great. So you are ready.
turns.zh: 太好了。那你都准备好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am. I will keep this new word safe.
turns.zh: 是的。我会把这个新密码收好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. Put it down if you like.
turns.zh: 好主意。如果想的话，写下来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have done that. It is in my book now.
turns.zh: 我已经写了。现在在我的本子里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Then you will have no more trouble.
turns.zh: 好的。那你就不会再遇到麻烦了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. So what is the new word?
turns.zh: 好的。那新密码是什么？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is the year 2024.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good one. Hard to see through.
turns.zh: 这个不错，不容易被猜到。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I put numbers in it.
turns.zh: 是的，我加了数字。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Now you may go in the system.
turns.zh: 很好。现在你可以进入系统了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will do it now.
turns.zh: 我现在就做。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Go on. I will be here.
turns.zh: 请便，我等着。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It works! I am in.
turns.zh: 成功了！我进来了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well done. So your work is done?
turns.zh: 干得好。那你的工作完成了？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I will send the paper now.
turns.zh: 是的，我现在就发送文件。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, so the paper is sent?
turns.zh: 好了，文件发出去了？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it went through well without trouble.
turns.zh: 是的，顺利发出去了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Now you have a new secret word.
turns.zh: 很好。现在你有新密码了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will keep it safe this time.
turns.zh: 这次我会好好保管。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do you have a place to put it?
turns.zh: 你有地方记下来吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put it down in my book.
turns.zh: 我会记在我的本子里。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good idea.
turns.zh: 这是个好主意。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will not make the same error again.
turns.zh: 我不会再犯同样的错误了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Anything more?
turns.zh: 那行。还有别的事吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, that is all. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 没有了，谢谢你的帮助。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Now you have a new secret word.
turns.zh: 好了，现在你有了新密码。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, i will keep it safe this time.
turns.zh: 这次我会小心放好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Got a bit of paper for that?
turns.zh: 你有纸记下来吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, i will put it down in my book.
turns.zh: 我会记在我的本子上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I will do that right away.
turns.zh: 是的，我马上去做。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is the system working well for you?
turns.zh: 系统运行正常吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, all is good. I will send the paper.
turns.zh: 是的，一切顺利。我这就提交文件。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Say if you need more help.
turns.zh: 很好。需要更多帮助就说一声。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. The paper is sent.
turns.zh: 搞定了。文件已经提交。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well done. That is all for you.
turns.zh: 干得好。你这边都好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put my new word in writing.
turns.zh: 我得把新密码记下来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. Put it on paper.
turns.zh: 好主意。写下来吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have a little book here. I will put it in.
turns.zh: 我这儿有个小本子。我把它写上去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then you will not have this trouble again.
turns.zh: 这样你就不会再遇到这个麻烦了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will keep it safe.
turns.zh: 对。我会好好收着。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is there anything more I can do for you?
turns.zh: 还有其他我能帮你的吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, thank you for helping me.
turns.zh: 没有了。谢谢你的帮助。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are welcome. Have a good day.
turns.zh: 不客气。祝你今天愉快。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks for your help.
turns.zh: 不用了，就这些。多谢你帮忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No problem at all.
turns.zh: 不客气。愿你今日顺心。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. sure.
turns.zh: 你也是。好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Goodbye. Take care.
turns.zh: 再见。保重。

storyBlurb: 周五清晨，甲急着登录系统提交文件，却发现自己忘了密码。在客服乙的帮助下，他验证身份、重置密码，最终成功登录。
storyScript:
【开场·无法登录】周五早上，甲坐在电脑前，屏幕上是登录界面。他输入熟悉的密码，却弹出错误提示。再试一次，依然失败。他皱起眉头，想起今天必须登录系统交一份重要文件。时间紧迫，他只能选择联系客服。

【进行·验证重置】甲拨通客服电话，乙温和地引导他验证身份。甲提供账户信息，回答安全问题，很快通过验证。乙发送密码重置链接到甲的邮箱。甲打开邮箱，点击链接，进入重置页面。他输入新密码，确认后提交。系统提示密码已更新。

【进行·登录成功】甲回到登录界面，输入新密码。这次，页面顺利跳转到系统主页。他松了一口气，迅速找到提交入口，上传文件。一切顺利，文件成功提交。

【收束·记住密码】甲看着屏幕，决定把新密码记在笔记本上。他写下密码，合上本子，心想下次不会再忘了。窗外阳光正好，甲端起咖啡，享受这片刻的轻松。
